title: Giant Mario Paint - Disco Necropolis (Skeleton Boomerang / +TEK)
description:
I'm not dead. Although this is a game about skeletons. Hm.

Uh, try to disregard that half the elements are invisible. And that the video compression is baked bungholes. This is just what the recording process is like on Linux and when I can't make use of the old lightweight lossless Camtasia codec I used to. Apparently.

I can't make any promises of future content. Even with a midi from the composer himself it took literal years and an extended stay-cation from work for me to muster up the barest minimum of effort to finish up the back half of this, mostly because I've only become gradually more mentally immobilized as the result of some Real Shit from a decade back. If I ever get around to figuring out composition for myself, you can perhaps expect something down the pipeline with all the grace of a 90's emo band, but that's a lot of hypotheticals between here and there.

Stay well, and may you have better luck with people than I have.
